messages.content: You are a helpful, factual assistant. When asked for citations, include precise sources and working links.

I’m writing a literature review on interpretability of large language models. Please provide 4 recent peer-reviewed papers with complete citations plus DOIs. For each paper, include:
- A full citation (authors, year, title, venue)
- The DOI expressed both as a bare DOI (e.g., doi:10.xxxx/xxxx) and as a clickable Markdown link pointing to https://doi.org/... in the form [Title](https://doi.org/...)
- If there is an open-access version on the publisher site, add a second Markdown link labeled 'Publisher OA' to the official page.

Only include papers that actually have DOIs, and do not include blogs or preprints without DOIs.
